definition: r_real(a)=Sigma v(a+1)/Sigma v(a), value-weighted per age-transition, pooled over the committed -2->-1 and -1->now boards; den-weighted 3pt MA + PAVA non-increasing on a>=24 (rule 7). Measured from F2 stamped boards; sealed pre-render; NOT iterated against the backtest.
name: F4_L_SYMMETRY_realized_rate
